name: Kaiju Paradise Rpg
description:
The Raytraxians Species are Shork, Lemon Shork, Watermelon Shork, Pseudo Shork, Kawaii Shork, Lantern Shork, Catte, Hazzy, Mochi, Fed, Kaiju, Shade, Panther, Plantix, Protogen, Dark Protogen, Nightcrawler Sprinklekits, Ghost Fox, Jammer Nightshade, Buck , Carneline, Slime hound, Lang, Feizao, Fashui, Crawlipede, Saturn, Spunky, Slime Pup and Hound Sinox.

Also haves Abbie shop and bandit

If you have any suggestions just comment

right now the Current Areas are Spawn(with the Bandits Shop), Flooded Area, Crystal Caves, and the Gas Area,and the Storage Bay, next the Cafeteria, and obviously Cave Garden, and finally the Library

Transmogrifying Objects

· Taser if a human walking into any body of water while holding a taser will electrocute the user, transforming them into a Ghost Fox

· Ice Cream Cones are a group of items that can be found within the Freezer in the cafeteria Upon eating 4 cones, the human Will feel weird and unease. Upon eating a 5th, the human will transform into a Sprinklekit.

· Plastic Orange Bucket: Transfurs a human into a Catte.

· Metal Bucket: Transfurs a human into a Buck.

· Hazmat Suit: Rarely transfurs a human into a Hazzy.

· Fedora: Transfurs a human into a Fed.

· Shades (Sunglasses): Transfurs a human into a Shade.

· Strange Flower: Red flowers found in cave gardens. Inhaling their fumes transfurs a human into a Plantix.

· Goggles: Extremely rare 3-lensed goggles that glow purple. Transfurs a human into a Nightcrawler.

· Soap: Overexposure to soap transfurs a human into either a Feizao or Fashui.
creator: Azu27272
